calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding. Documents (in a sealed envelope) produced pursuant to Gary Near's Subpeona duces tecum was given to Mr. O'Keeffe (Counsel for Mr. Near) by the Clerk prior to commencement of the proceeding.

This matter was called with Cross-Petition in case number PED-12-295778, Harry T. Campbell vs. Gary Near.

Appearances: Harry Campbell (Petitioner/Respondent in pro per). Sam O'Keeffe for and with Gary Near (Responent/Petitioner).

The Court stated these are Cross-Petition for each side and Tro was issued for each side.

The Court hears testimony and after hearing the testimony presented, the Court granted each side's Request for Restaining Order as follows: Each side shall stay at least 100 yards away from each other except when they are in 1408 California Street and that they must stay two yards away and move from the doorway if the other person needs to use the front door.

After hearing the Court's ruling, Mr. O'Keeffe requested for a brief recess to confer with his client and Mr. Campbell for a less restrictive order. The Court advised Mr. Campbell that a dismissal to his petition does not prevent him from filing a new petition. Each side agreed to withdraw their petition for restraining order. No orders are issued by the Court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
